reviews.review_title: Golf + is a life saving game.
reviews.review_description:
Golf + has allowed me to enjoy the game again. As a Cancer survivor with severe neuropathy, i could not do the walk anymore and have missed the time my son & I used to enjoy. Now, with Golf+ we enjoy the game together more times than we used to. 
Chance from Golf+ was amazing with a support issue we had. 
Not too shabby that this 70 yr old can play awesome courses 3, even 4 times a day. 
Love it and cannot get enough ❤️❤️❤️❤️❤️

I changed my review to 1 Star. The fact you can't just buy the game and get a bunch of courses is ridiculous. You get 4 courses for the cost of the game. Subscriptions or course purchases are ridiculously high. Don't get excited thinking this is like an old Tiger Woods video game where you get a bunch of courses. We're sadly in a time where in-game purchases rule the world. Golf+ is no different. I stopped playing the game pretty quickly because only getting a few courses and playing those same courses without any incentive to play more to unlock things doesn't appeal to me.

developer_response.body:
Hey acmillion88, sorry to hear you’re feeling frustrated, but we do appreciate you sharing the feedback. One of our big goals with GOLF+ is keeping the sport of golf as accessible as possible. Even if you don’t own any additional courses, you can still play the entire course library through daily and weekly tournaments, multiplayer games hosted by someone who owns the course, weekly challenges, and Quick Play rounds that rotate across courses you may not own.

We’ve also continued adding a lot to the game over time that’s free for everyone. GOLF+ originally launched years ago as a mini-golf game, and the full-course mode and the courses included today were actually added later as free expansions. Since then we’ve continued releasing new features, multiplayer formats, tournaments, and quality-of-life improvements that are available to all players.

Licensing and recreating real-world courses is a significant investment, which is why additional courses are optional purchases or included through the subscription. At the same time, we try to make sure players who haven’t bought extra content still have plenty of ways to experience everything the game has to offer.

We appreciate you giving the game a try and sharing your thoughts. Feel free to reach out directly anytime at help@golfplusvr.com !

reviews.review_description:
Still 5 stars, but please fix this issue. When media is playing, the game will crash if you walk in and out of your boundary or put the headset back on after taking it off.

*update* 

This is slowly becoming a game I won't reccomend anymore. Isnstead of fixing the media player it was just disabled. Now the wind and flag pop-ups are glitched, making rounds in higher wind basically unplayable. I'll be cancelling my subscription at the end of the month until they're fixed

developer_response.body:
Hey there, we're very sorry for the frustration here. Regarding the media player, this issue was introduced by changes made in a recent Meta system update. Unfortunately, as game developers we don't have the ability to modify or fix Quest operating system behavior ourselves. We identified the issue, reported it to Meta, and have been working closely with them by providing logs and details to help them investigate. Until a system-level fix is available, we had to disable the feature to prevent crashes and other stability problems.

In the meantime, there is an alternative that provides a similar experience. If you enable Seamless Multitasking in your Quest's Experimental Settings, you can open the Quest browser while playing and watch media alongside your round.

As for the wind and flag pop-ups, we'd love to learn more about what you're experiencing. We haven't seen other reports of this issue, and all of us on the team play daily without encountering it, so additional details would be extremely helpful in tracking down the cause. If you're willing, please reach out to us at help@golfplusvr.com with more information about what you're seeing, including when it occurs and what headset you're using.

reviews.review_description: I love this game, my girlfriend bought me the game and I have played almost everyday however I do have one complaint. When I am using my irons or wedges the ball doesnt go in the middle of my stance, instead it stays at my driver stance, now I don’t know if that’s a setting you can change or not but other then that the game is a blast.

reviews.review_title: The best golf game VR has ever created.
reviews.review_description:
You don’t even need to buy all the golf courses to play them, since you can access many of them through multiplayer. One of my favorite features is being able to play the same courses the PGA Tour is broadcasting in real time.

If you buy a golf club attachment (stick), the experience becomes even better and much more realistic.

I haven’t heard a single serious golfer complain about this game while actually playing it. I play almost every day, and it just keeps getting better with every update.

10/10.

reviews.review_title: Talk about a hole in one!
reviews.review_description: I was skeptical if I would like playing GOLF+ since I haven’t played golf in roughly 20 years but for $30 I figured I’d give it a try and to my surprise it’s been probably the best use of VR I’ve experienced yet since I’ve found that if I’m not doing the movement or activity and seeing that in game it makes me get motion sickness but with GOLF+ I can play for an hour or more and not have any issues. I tried playing with the controller alone initially but quickly ordered the Yezro Y14 Pro with magnetic weight and it took me right back to the days of swinging a real club and gives me the “feel” of hitting the ball and it’s been absolutely awesome and I can’t recommend it enough, they even have the Happy Gilmore hockey stick putter! I couldn’t be happier with the game and it’s worth every dollar.

This was awesome game until me and my friends found out the big downfall in this golf + game. YOU LOOK ON THE TOP RANKED LEADER BOARDS OF THE PEOPLE ON THERE AND U BE LIKE HOW ARE THE GETTING -10 and I found out how they doing it, they are LOWERING the CTP down to 6, 5,  the lower it is they easier the game is to make a hole are doing this makes the game less fun because u know lots of people on this game is not on our level which is 18.6 CTP which is hard.

So for the start of this of this review, i would say that this is a wonderful game.  Personally this is one of the best golf games out there. I love playing this with friends and the people who play this game. This is VERY worth the money. 

Now, I was going to join a weekly tournament then for some reason it told me i needed to uninstall because the meta files failed, which was confusing.  So i did and now i cant join back into the game. I tried uninstalling and reinstalling, even wiping my data to try and play. Now I'm still stuck on the "flying you to practice facilites" screen. Don't know if i did something wrong, or if the recent update did something to me. This is a wonderful and i would love to continue playing this, so if this could get fixed for me that would be amazing.

developer_response.body:
Hey takimansam, I'm sorry you've run into this issue. Based on your description, it sounds like your headset may have encountered an unusual Meta installation issue and gotten stuck in a bad state during the download or update process.

I'd be happy to help troubleshoot this with you and make sure we get you back out on the course as quickly as possible. If you wouldn't mind reaching out to us at help@golfplusvr.com with your in-game username and a brief description of what's happening, we can work directly with you to figure out exactly where things went wrong.

We appreciate your patience, and we'll do everything we can to get you back up and running.

reviews.review_title: Great game! An asset to real golf if …
reviews.review_description: If you love real golf and don’t have access to a simulator in the off season this can really help to groove your swing if used properly. Pay the money to get a quality grip that has weights so that it feels like your real club. Don’t try to be at the top of the leaderboard! It will more likely than not cause you to alter your swing to give you unrealistic yardage. Swing exactly as you would during a real round. Enjoy!

Golf+ is a great game, very realistic and so much fun.

Correction, I’ve changed my mind, Golf+ is a sport, not a game. I’m not into gaming. Set Golf+ settings to Pro and use a club attachment, swing as you would in real life golf and it’s just as much a sport as being out on the fairways of any golf course. Yes it is easier, but it still trips you up if you are not on your game, any tension in your body and you can kiss a good scorecard goodbye. Love it.

Since meta updated boundaries mine never set right when playing game. Im not sure if the game updated as well, but i can hit same shot and get 20 different results. My club settings have reset 3 times now on there own. Used to be my favorite game a must play everday: now just aggravation each time.

developer_response.body:
Hi BABrad, Thank you for reaching out and I'm sorry for the frustration you've been running into here. Would you mind reaching out to us at help@golfplusvr.com so we can take a closer look?

I'm not aware of any major Meta boundary changes that would be impacting tracking in GOLF+, and we haven't seen widespread reports of this from other players, so I'd love to dig into what's happening on your setup specifically.

The club settings resetting themselves is also something that definitely should not be happening. We'd like to investigate that as well and see if we can determine what's causing it.

If you send us an email with your in-game username and a few more details about what you're experiencing, we'll be happy to work through it with you and see what we can find.

reviews.review_description: This just doesn't work for me or interest me. Every time i play I have to reset clubs and meas with the program just to get it ready to play. With just the controller toi have no golf feel a good swing doesn't seem to matter. I play once or twice a week and this is a bad knockoff.  Better off playing somewhere with a a stand alone golf Sim

reviews.review_title: Removed the reason many users bought it
reviews.review_description: I bought the game on the promise of topgolf and pro putt, I do not remember clearly, but full courses may have been added when I bought it. If they were, I did not care for them. In the press release for golf+, they reaffirmed their full support for all 3 modes equally. Since then, the topgolf mode has been removed for licensing reasons, and pro putt has been removed because they realised they didn't feel like bothering to support it. The game no longer resembles the relaxing/fun golf experience that many other users and I paid for. They have cut away at the experience to chase the infinite profit of selling new courses. If removing pro putt was about having a focused golf+ app, why not release it as a separate downloadable? If I could go back and tell myself 4 years ago that it was all a lie and not to buy the game, I would.

developer_response.body:
Hey coopbarnia, we are sorry to hear about your frustration with the changes to those modes over the years. We sunset Pro Putt back in 2023 because by that point it was being used by only a fraction of a percent of our daily players, but it was still heavily intertwined with the code that powers the rest of the game. That meant any time we made improvements or changes to full course play where more than 99 percent of players were spending their time it required very long testing cycles to make sure nothing broke on the Pro Putt side. Over time that really started to slow down our ability to improve the parts of the game most players were using.

Releasing Pro Putt as a standalone download unfortunately is not as simple as putting the old version out there. There are ongoing costs to publishing and maintaining online games, and even a standalone version would still need updates and support to keep working with platform changes. With such a small active player base in that mode it just was not feasible for us to maintain it long term.

As you mentioned, our partnership with Topgolf also expired due to licensing so we no longer have the rights to host that facility in the game. That said, we are currently working on expanding the new practice facility into a much larger social hub and multiplayer hangout space with far more activities than the original Topgolf mode ever offered. Our hope is that it fills that same role for players who enjoyed having a more casual social place to spend time together in the game.

If you would ever like to share more feedback or talk through things further you are always welcome to reach out to us at help@golfplusvr.com

reviews.review_title: Most realistic golfing game out there!
reviews.review_description: My friend got me into golf a few days ago and i’ve been really enjoying it, we’ve only been at the driving range but this game allows me to play on actual courses. The in depth analysis system helps me to work on certain things that im not good at and its helped me to improve! This game is a must have for any actual golf lovers out there!

Definitely the high end of golfing. But the most realistic golfing experience there is. Wish there was an easier setup of power offset and such for people who don’t play. I don’t want to randomly guess how much extra power or help I need.

reviews.review_title: Was great. Now not so much.
reviews.review_description:
Used to LOVE this game. Back when it still felt like a social VR experience instead of just a golf simulator. One of the best parts was hanging out with friends, listening to music/videos, and just enjoying the vibe while playing TopGolf or messing around.

Now they’ve removed the music/media features and honestly the game feels way more sterile because of it. The social atmosphere was a HUGE reason a lot of us played in the first place.

The golf mechanics may be better now, but somehow the game feels less fun. Not everyone plays VR golf to sweat in competitive matches — some of us just wanted to chill, hit balls, listen to music, and hang out.

Really disappointing direction for the game. I have cancelled my subscription.

developer_response.body:
Hey Mike, we’re really sorry for the frustration here. We definitely understand that the social side of GOLF+ is a huge part of why a lot of people play, and that experience absolutely matters to us too.

One of the reasons we recently released the new social lobby system was specifically to lean further into that side of the game. It lets groups of up to 8 players get together, hang out, and play games in a similar spirit to the old Topgolf social experience.

I also want to clarify that we haven’t removed the media player permanently. It’s currently temporarily disabled because a recent Meta OS update broke the way the media functionality worked in-game and it was leading to a large number of crashes and a pretty rough overall experience for players. We’ve shared the issue directly with Meta and they’re actively working on a solution. Once that’s resolved, the plan is to re-enable the media player.

In the meantime, you can also use the headset’s Seamless Multitasking feature in the system settings to run content through the Quest system browser while playing. A lot of players have been using that as an alternative way to listen to music or watch content while they play.

We really appreciate the feedback though, because we do understand the concern. Competitive golf is important to some players, but the social “hang out with friends and chill” side of VR golf is a major part of GOLF+’s identity too.

If you’d like to share any additional thoughts or feedback directly with the team, feel free to reach out anytime at help@golfplusvr.com.

reviews.review_description:
Best vr golf game in the market but if you play real golf this game ruins your swing even if you use "golfclub adaptors". In Finland we cannot play real golf in the winters so vr-golf seems nice... And it is but when the season started it took nearly 2 months to get my old swing back after vr-golf. 90% of the hits were topps/blades.

Casual golfer/vr-player = 4/5
Minimum 40 rounds per 6 months and a 6 month brake in winter 2/5

The game is awesome. I can see where it can help you get better at the game. Just wish there was more free or cheaper courses. Maybe sometime later include create a course. I wish they had a bundle to get all the course at once instead of 3 or 4 in a pack.

reviews.review_title: Trust me it’s a MUST HAVE
reviews.review_description:
I’m not a big “write a review” guy, but in this case I’ll make an exception. I have played this game for many years and it’s really the only game I play. Where else can you play TPC Sawgrass…in your freakin living room. The multiplayer modes are awesome for meeting up and playing with friends. The single player modes are great for when you don’t feel like being around others. The graphics are top notch and really just to see how far it’s come since I first started playing years ago is incredible. Look me up and let’s play a round - C.Z.Geezy
Hats off to the developers and all of the efforts made toward making this the one and only golf game you’ll need.
really well designed golf game i've been playing for two to 3 years now and it's honestly one of the best golf games i've ever played, i recommend buying it 😀😆🙂😘😜😜🤭😋🥰🤩😛☺️🤩

Not  had the game long but it's changed my enjoyment with playing computer games .A used to play golf on a different format. This game takes you right in to the fun . Improving your swing or just to play challenges .
Feels like the closest thing you can get to real golf without spending over 500 dollars. The feel is just as good when you hit an amazing shot in the game just like the course! Keep up the good work!

They have cbanged everything about this game to grab as much money as possible. I stupidly bought a year subscription to the golf + pass and of course it went up to $90 which they just took out of my account without asking. Lazt year it was 50. Now almost a hundred dollars was taken from me for another year that i will never play this game. This game used to be as close to real golf you can get, now it's a video game, a bad one at that.  It is wildly inconsistent, two holes every round where it glitches on you  during your backs swing, especially during tournament play and even more so if you get credits.  I have no idea why you even have levels now, you don't get a thing for leveling up, or unlock anything..  just a pointless feature.  Everything at the store in the game is 5* what it used to be and you can only get 50 credits a day.  But then it's about raking as much of your money as possible.  I'm stunned to see 5 star reviews on here, I have a group of about 10 people who used to play daily that never play at all anymore.  It' seems decent on the surface, but if you really try to compete, and get good you will quit playing for sure..

developer_response.body:
Hey Jcfire20, I’m really sorry to hear how frustrated you’ve become with the game. I know you’ve shared a few versions of this feedback over time, and while we haven’t really had the chance to directly dig into things with you one-on-one, we do want to address some of the concerns you brought up here.

On the subscription side, the renewal price increase was tied to the first-year discounted rate that all users were eligible for when signing up. The discounted first-year price and the normal renewal price should have been shown both in-game and again during Meta’s checkout flow when the subscription was purchased. Unfortunately, subscriptions are fully managed through Meta’s systems, so we can’t stop or cancel renewals from our side once someone signs up for an auto-renewing plan.

We completely understand how frustrating it feels if the renewal caught you off guard, especially since Meta doesn’t really send much warning ahead of time before charging. The renewal price should also appear in the subscription section of the Meta app, headset settings, and on the store page itself, but I know that doesn’t help much after the fact.

As for credits and progression, I understand why the newer system may feel worse if you were someone who really optimized the older leveling/challenge loop. The goal with the objective system was actually to make credit income more stable for the majority of players. Under the older level-based system, higher-level players would eventually hit very long stretches without earning credits at all because leveling slowed down so much over time. Now players can consistently earn credits daily and weekly instead of having those big dry periods.

Importantly, though, credits are only tied to cosmetics and visual customization. We’ve intentionally avoided ever creating any pay-to-win mechanics. The default equipment performs the same as anything purchasable through credits.

You’re also fair in saying the level system could do more. Right now it mainly serves as a long-term progression milestone, though some items still unlock through leveling early on. We do agree there’s room to expand that system over time.

And regarding tracking/performance frustrations, I understand how aggravating that can feel during competitive play. While some tracking issues can stem from headset or controller behavior, we still take reports like that seriously and continue looking into ways to improve overall consistency and performance. As always please reach out anytime at help@golfplusvr.com with details.

reviews.review_description: I recently said that this game was atrocious. I realized that I was incorrect following my review. All the staff made it right by replenishing my coins that I believe were stolen and I’ve been having a lot of fun.

When I hit over triple bogey in a tournament it says that’s the limit and picks up my ball then I can’t do anything there’s not okay button or anything so I quit and re go into the game then it says would u like to resume your round but there’s nothing to press or anything it’s just that 
And it’s really getting on my nerves as I’ve had to delete and re download the game twice now as this keeps happening

developer_response.body:
Hey CLARKSON.vrfs, we haven’t had any prior reports of this specific behavior, so we really appreciate you flagging it. We’re definitely going to take a closer look internally now that we’re aware of it.

To help us investigate properly, it would be really useful if you could reach out to us at help@golfplusvr.com with a bit more detail. Specifically a general time range when this happened, or ideally a specific tournament round we can try to reproduce on our side.

That extra context will go a long way in helping us track down what’s going on and get it fixed.

reviews.review_description:
Daily comp you should be able to 
play it with someone instead of alone,  and scramble you should be able to bet coins against the other team , apart from that it's fantastic
Game has good potential but it’s too quiet around the courses. The driving range is pretty cool but save the $30 and get clap hands golf and also too many DLC’s and their way overpriced.￼￼
The new graphics are awesome. I like that you can choose the difficulty level. This game is super fun. I play every day. I can still enjoy golf in the winter!

I have golfed very little over the years primarily due to the big two, time and money. Golfing at a course can be extremely time consuming and expensive, something I would never be able to do on a regular basis. However, with Golf+, my skills have improved rapidly as there is such quick repetition of strokes, allowing an accelerated evaluation of form and technique. My swing has improved more in the last two weeks than it did over a period of decades. I really do love golf and the realism of Golf+

This game is great but meta is just horrible it's coming to steam soon thank God meta cannot handle the game anymore with its dog sht UI and "oculus" PC software thank you virtual desktops and soon steam VR!!!!

developer_response.body: Hey gillzz, We are really sorry for the frustration here. You can still choose to subscribe monthly within the game. From the main menu of the game select the settings icon in the top right hand corner, and then select the GOLF+ pass tab. That page will have the option for monthly or yearly. Should you run into issues getting a monthly subscription set up or have any other questions feel free to reach out to us directly anytime at help@golfplusvr.com

reviews.review_description: I downloaded this game first thing after I got my meta vr for Christmas and paid for it now it won’t update or launch I can’t play it anymore and don’t know how to remove it off my vr so I can’t play try to reload it. Piss poor

developer_response.body:
Hey RefDawg0887, If a game won’t update or launch, it’s usually tied to the headset software or the game version being out of date. If the headset OS is out of date enough, it can also prevent apps from updating properly.

We’d be happy to help you get this sorted and walk you through making sure both your headset and GOLF+ are fully up to date so you can get back on the course as quickly as possible. Feel free to reach out to us at help@golfplusvr.com and we’ll help troubleshoot it with you directly.

reviews.review_description:
Is Golf+ as realistic as a sim? No. But it’s really dang good for what it’s worth. It seems to be quite accurate with swing mechanics. I’ve already been practicing with it a lot to improve my swing. I’ve taken videos of myself swinging and have noticed some real improvements. 

Also, it’s just fun to be able to play something in the winter months. Definitely beats not playing at all. My friend and I still laugh about how we can hop on together and play a round. 5 stars.
I’ve never picked up a golf club in my life, but this game is awesomely great! Starting as an amateur is very manageable, thank you for giving us amateurs a fighting chance.
I recommend this to everyone who plays golf or likes golf it’s great simulation very realistic

This game is the biggest waste of time. The lack of realism is completely laughable. Whoever designed this game has never played golf. Welcome to epileptic golf! Every video game in the last thirty years puts this piece of garbage to shame.

developer_response.body:
Hi Swazuki, We are sorry to hear the experience as I lived up to your expectations. Everyone on the team is a passionate real-life golfer, ranging from dedicated amateurs to former touring professionals. We care deeply about building the most realistic experience possible, and we take feedback like this seriously.

If you’re willing to share more specifics about where the experience felt unrealistic or what aspects you think missed the mark, we’d genuinely appreciate it. You can reach us directly anytime at help@golfplusvr.com. Thanks for taking the time to share your thoughts.

reviews.review_title: this game is the livest thing in vr
reviews.review_description: the paying for all the courses is the worst part of the game.....its got its bugs in places but super cool game

Great game! Bought an AMVR club peripheral and can’t get enough. My Dad is 75 and can’t do real golf anymore but him and my brother and I all have Quest 3’s and love getting together and sharing time together.
Incredibly fun virtual game! Keeps me entertained and allows the competitive juices to keep flowing!
best golf game i’ve ever played on vr and will always be the best game i have played
This game is top shelf. It is the reason I started playing in real life

Golf+ is a fun way to learn about all the basic strokes you'll need to enjoy the game  without having to suffer chasing down lost balls. Adding an inexpensive golf grip accessory for the controller makes this feel more realistic than ever.￼

Love the updates and new courses, too. Glad to see that will be expanded to other platforms in the future; I'm very happy to see that this game is so successful.

i’ve been playing this for a few months now. i love how realistic the shot making is, the graphics could be a bit better, but i play at least one or two rounds minimum every day, and will continue playing daily. i highly recommend recommend this game and introduce it to anyone interested. thanks, a great game!!!
The ratings are justified! Plays and looks great! So fun!
Daily tournaments make coming home from work that much better!
This game is sooooo good its like im playing real golf.

The game brings family members together from across the country while it snows outside all winter. Winter now flies by. One suggestion: move the It’s Your Turn to the top or bottom of the display window, this would mean folks don’t have to wait for it to disappear to putt. We are bringing in new members each year, the game is a fabulous distraction to the winter blues!
Really enjoy this game when I cant make it to the course.

Golf+ Is the perfect example of how to experience VR. Never really played actual golf ⛳️ It great as I play against my friend who works in Abu Dhabi, we play, chat, catch up and talk as if we still lived in the same town. I notice alot of players complaining in the coments and I just don’t understand, the game/experience is incredible, my thoughts are the same people would find the exact same complaints while playing the real game.

I no longer play real golf, but absolutely fell in love with Golf +.   I play several times a day and have not missed one tournament in over a year. Obsessed is probably the best description for hiw much I love it.   They knocked it out of the park!  BTW. I am 73 years old and have more fun than a 13 year old!!

Golf plus is amazing! It put you right there on the golf course. The ball flight is exactly how I tend to hit, so kudos for creating an experience that so closely mimics the real world. The other thing I discovered by accident is exploring the courses and surrounding areas using the joystick. I don’t know why this isn’t discussed much, but I really enjoy seeing all the work the developers have put into modeling trees, homes, cars, cities, and on and on. You pull back on the joystick and suddenly you are 100 feet tall, then you push forward on the joystick and can travel instantly to anywhere you direct the end of the blue arc. Pull the trigger and you are right back where you started, ready to hit the ball. Brilliant addition to the game!

I played golf for many years, unfortunately I can no longer play. This game comes as close to the feeling of playing golf I have tried. It may not be the “real thing”, but when trying to sink that putt to make birdie or pull off a great sand shot to save par, it sure feels like I’m playing golf! That’s more than enough for me. Great game!!!

I am truly amazed by Golf+. I honestly didn’t think it was possible to recreate the feeling of real golf so accurately in virtual reality, but this game has exceeded every expectation. It takes a sport loved by millions around the world and brings it indoors in a way that feels incredibly authentic.

The realism is outstanding—from the swing mechanics and controls to the course environments, wind conditions, and attention to detail. Every round feels unique, and playing famous courses designed to mirror their real-life counterparts makes the experience even better.

What sets this game apart is the community aspect. You can play with friends, meet golfers from around the world, and compete in a fun, social environment. It’s more than just a game—it’s become a real passion of mine.

If you love golf or want one of the best VR experiences available, Golf+ is an absolute must-play.

Get the attachment so you can swing like a normal club- start with Amateur settings then move to Pro when you are comfortable. It's dang near a simulator level experience. Ability to play almost anytime, hit the range whenever you want is great. The courses are realistic, detailed and challenging. Online play with others is an absolute blast, chatting and playing a round can be very enjoyable.
Great tool for rainy or bad weather days. Also good to warm up before a round.

Best and most accurate virtual golf game, really looking forward to what other features they could add. 

The controls when using a club attachment are a bit goofy. Any time i try to turn a bit to change my aim direction it moves me to the sky.
It would be good to have more player movements for social purposes like hand tracking when not swinging the club or something

I purchased this app in February and have played it fairly regularly both solo and online with friends.  While it won't be quite simulator quality, it still at least gets you out swinging and the fact you can still play with friends anywhere there's an internet connection is pretty cool.  Plus the fact I can play a course like St. Andrews, Pebble Beach, Sawgrass or Lofoten Links and feel like I'm actually there is another bonus.  Now if EA Sports ever loses the rights to Augusta, that would be an awesome course to add to the list.

6 stars if I could. This is not only the best golf game ever made, it’s made me a better golfer in REAL life. And, on top of being super realistic, it’s allowed my brother and I to hang out ‘on the course’ across the country. Extraordinary game all around! And keeps getting better!!

Golf+ has filled a hole in my life! I know that sounds crazy because it's a game, but it's not just a game to me! Golf+ has brought me together with more new people and with new friends that are more than just a game friend. The people I have met on here and made friends with have helped me through some tough times in my life and I couldn't be more thankful for them and golf+ for bringing us together! Golf+ is a blessing and an OUTSTANDING GAME! 
Thank you golf+

reviews.review_title: Love The Game.  Newest Update is Buggy
reviews.review_description: Preface this by saying, I love the game.  It’s as close to real as you can swing in a small space.  As someone who is constantly on the road and has limited space most of the time, when weather is bad, nothing compares.  However, this latest update is very glitchy.  All gameplay modes have a glitch that is getting more increasingly frustrating with each use.  The screen spazzes out and randomly will hit your ball before you’ve even addressed it.  It’s impossible to get through three shots without it happening multiple times.  Once this issue is resolved, I’m sure I’ll go back to loving the game the same as before.  Until then, it’s unplayable for me.

3 separate headsets. Q2-3 and yet my headset is the issue. They say contact support so what? Your buddy Chance can take 6+ weeks to respond to only responding after spamming golf+ social Media?  Tried your website contact form about 3 years ago and still haven't gotten a response to that.  You said you to discord. Ok did that. So what Your buddy Chance  can look at a l screenshot and say it's a tracking issue didn't even acknowledge the fact that the screenshots were from seperate headsets Never once asking what the device versions is or anything and yet it's my device lol.  Your support is lazy and buries half the issue out of sheer laziness. My initial issue I solved on my own with a. Simple setting that took me a while to find and yet your support didn't bother even trying.  It's always the same answer user device issue and yet not a single other golf game I've played  loses tracking in such absurd ways. But it's fine it's a device right?    Fyi alot of the inquiries were made on headsets less then 6 months old.

developer_response.body:
Shayner, We’re really sorry to hear how frustrating this experience has been, and we appreciate you taking the time to lay it out so clearly.

It sounds like there may have been some miscommunication in earlier interactions, especially around tracking. Our goal is never to place blame on you or your hardware. When tracking comes up, it’s because in VR there are a lot of variables involved. Not just the headset itself, but also environmental factors like lighting conditions, reflective surfaces, or even things like LED strips. Those can impact multiple headsets in the same space and are super common trigger points for issues people face, which is why we often need to rule that side out first. This still goes for situations where multiple headsets see issues. If they were playing in the same environment they would be equally impacted.

In your case, we did spend time reviewing recordings and breaking them down frame-by-frame. What we saw there was that the in-game club behavior was matching the shot data being reported, which did point to some inconsistency with your tracking. Since the game can only respond to that movement input we get from the headset, it pointed us toward tracking as a contributing factor. Though that doesn’t mean the situation is simple or that your frustration isn’t valid.

The fix you mentioned of disabling hand tracking in the system settings is actually a system-level workaround. When controller tracking becomes unstable, the headset can fall back on hand tracking as a supplementary input. If that’s also struggling, it can compound the issue, so turning it off can help stabilize things. 

Regarding support, we understand the concern. In many cases, if we have an account username, we’re able to access device and session data on our end, which helps reduce the need for back-and-forth questions. So even if we didn't ask your device type or version numbers we can pull that info remotely to save having to ask you. 

If any response came across as dismissive or overly simplified, that’s not the experience we want to provide and we genuinely apologize for that. 

We do see a couple of prior support interactions starting 2023 where we replied right away and were able to help; including getting you access to Valhalla and providing Kiawah Island as a make-good while a system-level install issue was being resolved on Meta’s side. That said, we don’t see any history of inquiries coming through the website support form. That form is primarily tied to the Shopify side of things rather than our main support pipeline, so it’s possible it didn’t route into the support inbox the way it should have.

We can see you’ve put hundreds of rounds into the game, and that kind of dedication genuinely matters to us. We’re sorry if your interactions with us or in the community haven’t reflected the level of care you should expect.

If you’re still running into issues, we’re always open to taking another look and working through it with you.

reviews.review_description: From someone who has played only Pitch and Putt and been to the Driving Range only a few times, this Golf + game has everything to make me feel like a real golfer. Particularly now the Avatars have legs, watching back the replays to see how you swing to drive off, is a bonus for me and helps me improve ….. although for more information on that I have looked at EnonoGolf Personal. This one is more fun though! There are also a handful of nice courses to start and keep you happy plus a good number to purchase for those much better than me.

Easily the best golf game I have played in terms
 of really feeling as if you are on the golf course. Really challenging but fair it is as difficult as the real game without turning you away. Obviously the more you practice the better you will be which is just like the real game as well.

reviews.review_title: I don't even like golf...but love this.
reviews.review_description:
I've used to golf with my boss occasionally, was just an excuse to get out work for the day for me. Never really enjoyed it, just liked drinking beers and losing balls. After I left that job there was no more golfing. I got this game free with my Meta+ subscription, so I thought I'd at least try it inout. I'm hooked. I love it. I'm still not very good at it, but I love playing it. Very relaxing. My VR Golf attachment is coming in tomorrow...can't wait!!!

Edit : love the club!!!

Loving this game, but it has confirmed what I already know...my golf swing needs a lot of work. The practice area actually has a swing analysis option that shows the swing stats and club path. I'll be using this to "tweek" my real swing. The game play is a lot of fun too. I purchased this primarily to get me through the off-season months (NY winter) and it is "scratching" my itch.

Update (5 months after owning this game): After reading some of the negative reviews, I feel the need to update my review. Make no mistake...if you love golf, you will love this game. The community is great. The game play is VERY realistic. It does have some bugs, but I believe that the DEV's care and do their best to resolve them. I have purchased the subscription to all the courses, but there really isn't any reason to. The tournaments and multiplayer rounds are the best way to experience different courses without paying for them. I would give this game 10 stars!!

I've been playing on Golf+ for about a year now.  I hadn't played golf for 40 years. Now on pro level I've reduced my handicap from 30 to 3. I spend a lot of time on the practice range honing my game.  Now I play 36 holes a day and sometimes a few battles or take on the challenges.  I can't believe I get to play these great courses regularly and at so low cost. If you have any interest in golf or vr you should try this game.
Took a bit of getting used to but great fun and training aid 😁
But like lowk lower the price to get clubs ts is so expensive but other than that its a great game wait nvm the price of the maps are hella expensive also.

reviews.review_title: Great to help a beginner learn the game
reviews.review_description: As someone who has only started playing golf the past few years this game has definitely been a great tool to understand how to correct some bad swing mechanics and hit the ball straight. Making smart club selections and understanding how to play different scenarios. Obviously it’s not 1:1 to real golf but it’s a ton of fun and if you’re new to golf in general you will be able to learn a lot about the game that translates onto real courses. Love the game and play almost daily.

One of the best games available for XR. Like others I see mention, this game is its own sport with its own set of skills, but it's more of a sport than a game.  It feels like we're right around the corner from professional "V-sports". It can help many aspects of your real-life golf game. I've played this daily for over a year and I'm able to separate things that are unique to the game vs real-life golf.. which I have a lot more to work on.
Love being able to plày over the world best game ever

I'm hoping that somehow support sees this and contacts me. I was billed for my annual subscription and suddenly it goes from $49.99 to $85 and some change my credit card rejected the charge due to this. I wasn't notified of a price increase so I tried to contact support and can't find where to do that. I looked at the annual price for subscription to see if it had changed and it's still at $49.99 why was I charged $85?

developer_response.body:
Hey Bam3375, really sorry for the confusion here. You can reach us directly anytime at help@golfplusvr.com, and we’re happy to assist with any issues.

As for the charge, when you originally signed up, the $49.99 was a first-year promotional price, and the renewal is billed at the standard annual rate. Which is why you saw the higher amount this time around. This should have been messaged to you at the time of subscribing initially as well as the various renewal screens prior to the time of renewal. I am really sorry if there was any ambiguity on our side, or the Meta side of things here, that led to this confusion.

reviews.review_description: This game is awesome, I love it!

reviews.review_title: A Fun, Relaxing Time with Friends
reviews.review_description:
This app achieves that which is so difficult with VR. You forget about the tech on your head and controllers in your hands and you feel like you’re out golfing with your friends. Such a blast!

Also, customer support has been so great! They addressed my issue quickly and generously.
Genuinely love this game worth every penny.  I can drive like 330 which is very realistic.  Playing with friends is even better.  Great game overall.

I am an avid golfer and I love this app. If you are looking to up your game this is a great way to do it. The realism of shot making is so good also I love playing courses that I can’t play on. Playing with friends makes it more enjoyable. 
Thanks golf+￼

I went from not know how to play to getting a general idea on how to play using Golf + and it got me hooked. I’ve met some very friendly individuals and have been able to see myself grow in the game. Like golf in real life, you will have your good days and bad days.
Even though some things are expensive this game is so editing! 5 stars

It is a great game for doing golf challenges such as breaking 50 or getting a hole in one no matter the weather. Really great game I would recommend to anyone who wants to play golf. Andnits better if your not the best at real life golf because in real life i hit 9 iron 120 yards but in this game I hit it 190. Best friend golf game on the market. The only downside is the price. But you can still survive because it provides starter clubs, which you can get coins by playing rounds and tournaments. And also provides 3 free starter courses. Overall amazing game 10/10 would recommend to any type of golfer, new or existing.
how many people can say they've played on such beautiful courses in the nude?
I tried it a few years ago on a friend's quest and now I have my own it's even better loving the upgrades you've made can't wait to get lost in this just waiting for headset to charge
